title: Why Coherent Stock Fell 24% This Week
text: Coherent beat expectations with its fiscal fourth-quarter results despite continued macroeconomic uncertainty. But those macro headwinds are also limiting near-term growth and visibility, causing the company to issue conservative guidance for the coming year.

title: Coherent Corp. (IIVI) Q4 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Coherent Corp. (NYSE:IIVI ) Q4 2023 Results Conference Call August 16, 2023 9:00 AM ET Company Participants Paul Silverstein - VP, IR Dr. Chuck Mattera - Chairman and CEO Mary Jane Raymond - CFO Dr. Giovanni Barbarossa - Chief Strategy Officer and President, Materials Segment Dr. Mark Sobey - Laser Segment, President Conference Call Participants Samik Chatterjee - JPMorgan Simon Leopold - Raymond James Meta Marshall - Morgan Stanley Vivek Arya - Bank of America Tom O'Malley - Barclays Jed Dorsheimer - William Blair Christopher Rolland - Susquehanna Ananda Baruah - Loop Capital Ruben Roy - Stifel Dave Kang - B. title: Why Coherent Stock Is Crashing Today
text: Coherent's Q4 results actually beat expectations. But the company's forward guidance came in much weaker than the market had anticipated.

title: Coherent Stock Dives on Outlook Miss. Analyst Still Sees 'Bright Spot' Ahead.
text: Coherent expects to report fiscal first-quarter earnings of 5 cents a share to 20 cents a share on revenue between $1 billion and $1.1 billion.

title: Coherent Corp stock drops as outlook disappoints investors
text: Coherent Corp (NASDAQ:COHR) stock traded 20% lower ahead of Wednesday's open after giving investors weaker-than-expected guidance for the upcoming financial year. The optical and semiconductor tech company warned the market, in quarterly results last night, that it is not expecting to see a “meaningful rebound” from the macroeconomic challenges that have impacted its business in the past year.

title: 5 Things to Know Before Markets Open
text: Housing starts are expected to rise and Intel ends its plans to acquire Israeli chipmaker Tower Semiconductor. Here's what investors need to know today.

title: Compared to Estimates, Coherent (COHR) Q4 Earnings: A Look at Key Metrics
text: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for Coherent (COHR) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended June 2023, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.

title: Coherent issues a grim earnings outlook, and its stock is tanking
text: Shares of Coherent Corp. tumbled 17% in after-hours trading Tuesday after the optoelectronics company issued a weaker-than-expected outlook for the quarter and year ahead.

title: Coherent Corp. Releases Fourth Quarter and Full Fiscal Year 2023 Financial Results
text: PITTSBURGH, Aug. 15, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Coherent Corp. (NYSE: COHR), a global leader in materials, networking, and lasers, announced today the financial results for its fourth quarter and full fiscal year 2023. These have been posted as a letter to shareholders to the investor relations section of its website.

title: Coherent Unveils Additive Manufacturing Technology to Produce Advanced Ceramic Components for High-Performance Thermal Management Applications
text: PITTSBURGH, Aug. 10, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Coherent Corp. (NYSE: COHR), a global leader in ceramics and metal matrix composites, today announced that it has developed an additive manufacturing process capable of producing advanced ceramic components for high-performance thermal management applications, including for next-generation semiconductor capital equipment.

title: Coherent Achieves Milestone of Shipping More Than 200 Billion VCSEL Emitters for Sensing
text: PITTSBURGH, Aug. 01, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Coherent Corp. (NYSE: COHR), a global leader in optical sensing, today announced that it has shipped more than 200 billion vertical-cavity surface-emitting semiconductor laser (VCSEL) emitters to date for sensing.
